codeReview.summary: Implementation successfully creates lectures.json with content for Lectures 1 and 2, and updates LectureReader to load from JSON. All verification steps passed - lectures display with proper content, syntax highlighting, and section navigation. The code follows React patterns, uses useMemo for performance, and properly handles fallback for lectures without full content.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Commit d3161da contains unrelated changes from multiple missions (ui-fixes mission, scrutiny reviews, content-extraction) in violation of AGENTS.md small PRs guidance
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show d3161da --stat shows: .factory/services.yaml, .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md, scrutiny reviews, AND data/processed/lectures.json - all in one commit

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker SKILL.md was created in the same commit (d3161da) as this feature - this is a chicken-and-egg situation where the skill didn't exist when the feature started
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show d3161da shows .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md was added in same commit as lectures.json. The skillFeedback indicated worker followed procedure despite this.

sharedStateObservations.observation: validation-contract.md lacks semantic content assertions (VAL-CONTENT-*) - only structural validation is performed. Worker extracted content from PDFs but there's no way to verify the content semantically matches the feature description
sharedStateObservations.evidence: VAL-LECT-001, VAL-LECT-002, VAL-LECT-003 only verify 'lecture exists', 'has sections', 'code blocks' - not that content matches feature description (e.g., Lecture 1 should cover binary/hex numbering, Lecture 2 should cover registers MOV)

sharedStateObservations.observation: Two copies of processed data files exist at different paths with different sizes: 'data/processed/lectures.json' (146910 bytes) vs 'src/data/processed/lectures.json' (84730 bytes). LectureReader imports from src/data/processed/lectures.json via @ alias. This duplication could cause maintenance/sync issues.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: LectureReader.tsx:4 imports from '@/data/processed/lectures.json'. Both files exist but have different sizes. This pattern also exists for other processed JSON files (concept-taxonomy.json, examples.json, question-bank.json).

summary: Feature extract-lecture-1-2 PASSES review. Worker successfully extracted content for Lectures 1 and 2 into lectures.json and updated LectureReader component. Build passes, interactive verification confirmed lectures render correctly with syntax highlighting and section navigation. Content includes numbering systems (binary/hex) for Lecture 1 and registers/MOV for Lecture 2 as specified. Non-blocking issues: commit contains unrelated changes (violates small PRs guidance), skill created in same commit (chicken-and-egg), validation-contract lacks semantic assertions, and duplicate data file locations with different sizes.
